"}, {"bbox": [162, 810, 915, 838], "category": "text", "text": "When POWER_ONLY_ABOVE_5V bit is set to logic level high, the VBUS_EN_SNK pin is asserted only when a PDO2 or PDO3 explicit contract is established with the source (see Section 3.3 Auto-run mode)."}, {"bbox": [162, 839, 918, 867], "category": "text", "text": "This feature is suited for sink devices requiring high power charging profile above 5 V to be fully operational (see Section 6.1.2 Powering a system under high charging profile only)."}, {"bbox": [162, 867, 895, 896], "category": "text", "text": "VBUS_EN_SNK pin is a high voltage open drain output that allows a PMOS transistor to be directly driven to enable the $V_{BUS}$ power path."}, {"bbox": [66, 969, 164, 984], "category": "footer", "text": "DS12499 - Rev 8"}, {"bbox": [870, 972, 930, 985], "category": "footer", "text": "page 8/42"}] ```
